original_snippet_context: Discussion about potential negative impacts of hypothetical bad harvests on the Caixa de Conversão's gold reserves and the return to inconvertibility.
relevant_quote: dissipado o ouro accumulado na Caixa do Convênio, o cambio começaria a ser especulado, a moeda passaria a ser um joguete nos mãos dos jogadores e o bilhete fluctuante voltaria.
justification: This quote expresses concern about the depletion of gold reserves in the Caixa de Conversão due to economic hardship (poor harvests), leading to currency speculation and fluctuation, which aligns with orthodox fears about instability.
